metadata.title:
HENRIETTA CROSSNAN WILL "BEG


.BORROW OR STEAL BABLES''

pages.raw_text:
lieve in the future of America and
heartily believe in the influence
of woman"


when l hear a woman say, I
don't believe in equal rights 1
conclude she is ignorant of the
laws and give her an example Of
some of them which still exist in
some states. Suppose you had a
husband and children and that hus-
band sa wifi to will your children
away from you. What would you
think? L wouldn't stand for 1t.
she will exclaim. When she is
awakened, the first thing you know
she is suffragist. She has invest
igated the laws. 1t is ignorance of
the law which makes women OPP
post equal suffrage.


II am an actress and live in my
own little world, and haven't much
time for anything else but my
work and my family. l can't af-
ford to disappoint the public. l
must look pretty" and she puck
cred her mouth. "My eyes must
be bright" and she cast side
glance into the morror before
which she was standing" and
have to appear young. Or else,"
she continued, "the people would
say, She isn't what she used to
be- and that would never, never
do. l must please the people"
